title: Implement a grassed area maintenance program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a grassed area maintenance program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for grassed area maintenance work

pcs.text: Clarify requirements for maintenance program with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify requirements for maintenance program with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify requirements for maintenance program with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify permanent and temporary obstacles on grassed area and manage according to maintenance program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify permanent and temporary obstacles on grassed area and manage according to maintenance program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify permanent and temporary obstacles on grassed area and manage according to maintenance program.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety and environmental hazards, and assess risks and implement controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety and environmental hazards, and assess risks and implement controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety and environmental hazards, and assess risks and implement controls.

pcs.text: Identify and select equipment and resources according to the maintenance program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select equipment and resources according to the maintenance program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select equipment and resources according to the maintenance program.

pcs.text: Identify priorities and schedule maintenance activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify priorities and schedule maintenance activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify priorities and schedule maintenance activities.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check tools, equipment and machinery, and rectify, report or and tag faults.

pcs.text: Adjust and calibrate equipment according to maintenance program and manufacturer instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust and calibrate equipment according to maintenance program and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-operational checks of tools, equipment and machinery according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-operational checks of tools, equipment and machinery according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select, check, use and maintain personal protective equipment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check, use and maintain personal protective equipment.

elements.title: Implement grassed area maintenance activities

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess site-specific safety hazards and implement controls according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement pre-start checks and start-up procedures for machinery according to operator instructions.

pcs.text: Operate machinery and equipment on grassed area according to maintenance plan, operator instructions and workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate machinery and equipment on grassed area according to maintenance plan, operator instructions and workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement shut-down procedures for machinery according to manufacturer instructions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store equipment and dispose of waste materials according to workplace and environmental procedures.
